character_buff.name: PREP
character_buff.description: Check and prepare the surgical equipments and motivate oneself.

effects: Duration: 300 seconds
Movement Speed +20%
SPD Limit +20%
D.R. +1, DEF +5, IMM +5 during [Surgery]
A.R. +1, ATK +10%, Physical Penetration +10 during [Expire]. Effects disappear on Stance change.

stances.name: Surgery

skills.name: ANE
skills.description: Anesthetize or put the target within the range to sleep by throwing an anesthetic potion. Apply [Anesthesia] when used on own character.

effects: Duration : 20 seconds
Ally DEF +2, All RES +1, Nullify enhanced value of normal, skill ATK when hit by enemy during [Anesthesia], Max. HP -50%
Cannot re-apply [Anesthesia] for 30 seconds after effect duration is over
30% chance to inflict [Sleep] on enemy, Increase in chance proportional to [STR] or [HP] of Tom

skills.name: Decision
skills.description: Check and make an incision into the wound.

effects: Ignore enemy DEF by 65
60% chance to inflict [Bleeding]
Damage x2 when [Decision] is used to enemies under [Sleep]
Ignore enemy DEF by 65
60% chance to inflict [Bleeding]
Damage x2 when [Decision] is used to enemies under [Sleep]

skills.name: Resection
skills.description: Surgically remove the wound. [Excision] is applied when used against allies and enemies.

effects: Ignore enemy DEF by 50
Duration : 120 seconds
Ally ATK +30%, ATK against monsters +20%, Critical Rate +20%, All Penetration +10, Additional effect is applied according to the weapon equipped
[Attack Reaction] is applied after [Excision] is over
30% chance to inflict [Excision] on enemy, increase in chance proportional to [STR] or [HP] of Tom.
Ignore enemy DEF by 50

30% chance to inflict [Excision] on enemy, increase in chance proportional to [STR] or [HP] of Tom.

skills.name: Suture
skills.description: Finish the surgery by stitching up the wound. [Stitch is applied] when used against allies and enemies.

Duration : 120 seconds
Ally DEF +20, All RES +15, IMM +10, Additional effect is applied according to the armor equipped
[Defense Reaction] is applied after [Stitch] is over

skills.name: ABR
skills.description: Builds a ward which recovers HP of nearby friendly force quickly. Only 1 unit available.

effects: Ally HP recovery increased within the range
Ally HP recovery increased within the range

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [STR]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 4% DMG according to extra [STR]
Ignore additional DEF according to extra [STR] * 3
Additional DMG against Monster according to 4 * 50

stances.name: Expire

skills.name: Hyperbolemic Shock
skills.description: Stabs the target reckless to bleed.

effects: Ignores enemy DEF by 75
[Delight of Slaughter] Lv +1 when skill hits enemy
[Delight of Slaughter Lv 3] changes to [Tom - Reckless]
Ignores Damage exceeding current HP twice and resets level
[Artery Amputation] Lv +1 to enemy when skill hits enemy
[Artery Amputation Lv 3] stops renewal
[Monster] with [Artery Amputation Lv 3] receives additional Damage and 50~100% Critical Damage from normal attack of Tom
[PC] with [Artery Amputation Lv 3] receives additional Damage and 1~7% Damage proportion to Max HP from normal attack of Tom
[Artery Amputation] not applicable to same target for 30 seconds.
